info.name: Chicken Tikka Boneless Bucket Biryani (serves 3)
info.description: Serves 3 | Marinated and perfectly grilled chicken tikka nuggets in layers of basmati rice and caramelised onions.

info.name: Butter Paneer Bucket Biryani (serves 3)
info.description: Serves 3 | This recipe is carefully crafted to blend in all the flavors from the dum biryani with delicate chunks of Paneer cooked in silky makhni gravy. Served with Mirchi ka Salan and creamy veggie raita.

info.name: Chicken Boneless Bagara Bucket Biryani
info.description: Serves 3 | Aromatic Basmati Rice cooked in Ghee, caramelized onion and mild spices - paired with juicy boneless chicken chunks cooked in the right blend of Indian masalas.

info.name: Butter Paneer Bagara Bucket Biryani (serves 3)
info.description: Serves 3 | Mildly spiced fine grained Basmati Rice cooked in Ghee paired with well marinated Paneer cooked in homestyle makhni gravy.

info.name: Chicken Lollipop - 6pc
info.description: Serves 1 | Succulent Chicken lollipops with a hot, smoky kick served with green chutney.

info.name: Chicken Tikka Masala Boneless Bagara Pulav Meal
info.description: Serves 1 | Indulge in aromatic chicken tikka masala alongside fragrant Bagara rice. Served with cooling raita, tangy mirchi ka salan, and ambrosial payasam.

info.name: Chicken Tikka Masala Boneless Biryani Rice Meal
info.description: Serves 1 | Relish flavourful chicken tikka masala paired with aromatic biryani rice. Complete with soothing raita, zesty mirchi ka salan, and heavenly payasam.

info.name: Pepper Chicken Masala Bagara Pulav Meal
info.description: Serves 1 | Savour peppery chicken alongside aromatic Bagara rice. Served with cooling raita, tangy mirchi ka salan, and a divine payasam treat.

info.name: Pepper Chicken Masala Biryani Meal
info.description: Serves 1 | Delight in zesty pepper chicken paired with fragrant basmati rice. Complete with soothing raita,  mirchi ka salan, and ambrosial payasam.

info.name: Guntur Chicken Curry Bagara Meal
info.description: Serves 1 | Experience fiery Guntur chicken alongside fragrant Bagara rice. Served with soothing raita, tangy mirchi ka salan, and heavenly payasam.

info.name: Payasam (200 g)
info.description: Serves 1 | Payasam of the Day

info.name: Ghee Gulab Jamun (4 Pcs)
info.description: Serves 1 | Khoya rich dumplings are deep fried and then given a soaking in sugar syrup.

info.name: Ghee Gulab Jamun (2 Pcs)
info.description: Serves 1 | Khoya rich dumplings are deep fried and then given a soaking in sugar syrup.

info.name: Tender Coconut Pudding
info.description: Serves 1 | A delicately set pudding made from fresh, tender coconut water and creamy coconut milk, offering a smooth, melt-in-the-mouth texture. Light, refreshing, and soul-soothing—this chilled dessert is perfect for any time of the day, especially after a hearty meal.
